name: geocode_location
description: Convert between place names and geographic coordinates. Direct geocoding turns a city name into latitude/longitude. Reverse geocoding turns coordinates into place names. Also supports zip/postal code lookups. Essential for converting user-friendly location names into coordinates required by other weather endpoints.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: City name, optionally with state code and country code separated by commas (e.g. 'London,GB' or 'Portland,OR,US').
